why_wrong: Idtmod Phase Accumulator: forces the main output to zero, so coarse compilation passes but behavioral stimulus points fail.
Idtmod Phase Accumulator: keeps the main datapath plausible while reporting the wrong metric value.
Idtmod Phase Accumulator: mishandles reset or initialization, passing steady-state samples but failing startup or recovery checks.
Idtmod Phase Accumulator: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
Idtmod Phase Accumulator: uses a wrong gain or scale factor, leaving shape plausible while calibrated checks fail.
